case_title: FELICIA PACIFICA VS. ARCHDIOCESE OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY PACIFICA, FELICIA AS TO DEFENDANT ARCHDIOCESE OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-02-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-02-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-02-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY JOHN SCUDDER--PRESIDENT SHC. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-02-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PACIFICA, FELICIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ARCHDIOCESE OF SAN FRANCISCO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
